'''Tok Ashel''' was the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]] [[Cartao Expeditionary Army|Expeditionary Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the first [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of the war, Ashel worked closely with [[Dif Gehad]], the Master Creator of New Products, who was making investments for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] under the command of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. As the Separatists invade [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]], Ashel and Gehad planned on stealing the [[Cranscoc]] fluid technology and take over one of the factories in order to use equipment and special purposes throughout the war. Since [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Pilester Binalie]] attempted to remain neutral throughout the war, Ashel and Gehad held Pilester's son, [[Corf Binalie|Corf]] hostage to ensure cooperation. This was when the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces, led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jafer Torles]], arrived on the planet to put an end to the Separatist occupation. The two Neimoidens were able to escape the factory's destruction during the start of the [[Attack on Cartao|ensuing battle]].<ref name="HOC" />
